## Meeting Purpose

[Reconnect and update on GrowthX's SOC 2 compliance timeline and Vanta engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has grown rapidly (25-30 to 75 employees) but SOC 2 remains a 2026 initiative](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [SOC 2 isn't urgent due to GrowthX's public-info-only work, but it's strategically important](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Tentative timeline: Late Oct/Nov '25 for Vanta engagement, aiming for H1 2026 SOC 2 compliance](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Pricing crucial: Vanta's core package at $25K (list) for 51-100 headcount; cost vs. Drata key factor](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Rapid Growth

  - [Headcount surge: \~25-30 in March to \~75 now](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Customer base and ARR growing rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Management focused on "holding onto the rocket ship"](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

### SOC 2 Timeline and Priorities

  - [SOC 2 compliance pushed to 2026 initiative](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [8-9 month project estimate](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Currently in 6-8 week holding pattern](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Prerequisites (e.g., employee handbook) need management attention](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Incremental security improvements ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

### Enterprise Customers and SOC 2 Necessity

  - [Clients include Ramp and Service Titan](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [No urgent SOC 2 requests due to GrowthX's public-info-only work](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Viewed as marketing agency, low risk for data handling](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

### Vanta Engagement Timeline

  - [Late October/early November 2025 target for moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Aiming for H1 2026 SOC 2 compliance](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Next meeting scheduled for week of October 20th, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)

### Pricing and Competitive Landscape

  - [Vanta core package: $25K list price (51-100 headcount)](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Cost a significant factor vs. competitors (e.g., Drata)](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Vanta open to negotiation but won't be cheapest option](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Liam to send updated quote and list pricing to Yousef](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Reconnect in week of October 20th, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [GrowthX to finalize decision on Vanta vs. competitors (e.g., Drata) based on pricing and features](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare for potential November 2025 engagement start](https://fathom.video/share/zsiub1UMBvT9XMY8PTL9s81WHnn3obMx?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
